premise: In a crumbling desert city, a disgraced general discovers the empire she served is built on a lie. Now she must choose between exposing the truth — which could collapse the empire — or burying it to protect the people she still loves.

characters.name: Kael
characters.description: A disgraced general haunted by the siege she led. Sharp mind, bitter tongue. Exiled to the frontier after questioning the emperor's orders.

characters.name: Rina
characters.description: The empire's spymaster who knows the founding lie and will kill to keep it hidden. Former comrade of Kael.

characters.name: Davan
characters.description: A young archivist who accidentally uncovered the documents that started everything. Idealistic, terrified, in over his head.
